paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6, with a change of -0.91% from the prior close and -33.17% over the last 20 sessions.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's CEO departure, governance concerns, and a $375 million convertibles deal. A director designee, Miles Everson, resigned citing governance concerns, and the company completed an offering of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031.

There have been recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings.
